base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should reveal whether delta/charm breakout captures incremental VALID_0DTE continuation PnL or reroutes low-quality entries away from existing squeeze/charm-wall/call-wall profiles. Accept only if total net profit stays within 98% of run_055, completed trades do not drop more than 10%, slow_12h remains 0, and squeeze plus charm_wall_breakaway combined PnL is not materially cannibalized. Main tradeoff is duplicate routing of an already-covered option-flow state.
label: delta-charm-breakout-attribution-probe
rationale: The leader is plateaued across run_044/run_050/run_055, and repeated call-wall/charm-wall/take-profit keysets are now either flat or profit-suppressive. The strategist track explicitly calls for new-regime router attribution. Activating delta_charm_breakout_long is the cleanest legal config-only discovery experiment: it changes no global vetoes, does not loosen missing/stale 0DTE behavior, and tests an underexplored VALID_0DTE option-flow concept against protected squeeze and charm-wall continuation edges.
